description:
This quiz tests intermediate to advanced JavaScript knowledge, focusing on features introduced from ES2015 to ES2022. It uses a playful, engaging tone with emojis and a challenge-based structure, offering a moderate to challenging difficulty level through multiple-choice questions.
Topics: ES2015 (ES6) features, ES2022 features, JavaScript syntax evolution, Modern JavaScript best practices
Audience: Developers with existing JavaScript knowledge seeking to assess or reinforce their understanding of modern language updates and syntax changes between ES2015 and ES2022.
